subject: WM-0009 ready for review
body: Fixed reviewer-requested regressions in WM-0009: patch application now revalidates references/localization after cloning and patching, patch field shape/type issues now emit structured diagnostics with source locations, and JSON5 fixture sources are parsed or explicitly rejected instead of being silently ignored. Re-ran content validation, content tests, compile smoke, typecheck, lint, format, boundaries, and diff checks.
